title: Neow's Fury
description:
Deal 10 damage.
Put 2 random cards from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
upgraded_description:
Deal 14 damage.
Put 3 random cards from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
notes: Draws random cards from the discard pile. Cannot be generated in combat.
